calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-06-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Plaintiff Jesse C. Ralph, Esq. was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Bennett Hirschhorn.
Default was entered against defendant on January 11, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 25, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Jesse C. Ralph, Esq., and against the Defaulted Defendant Bennett Hirschhorn as follows:

Damages/Principal - $40,430.39.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,766.67.
Costs - $480.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $51,677.06.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
